description_long: This is a modern sniper rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top for precision aiming. The rifle features a tactical stock with an ergonomic pistol grip and an adjustable buttstock, designed for stability and comfort during extended use. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, allowing for quick reloading. The rifle is equipped with a bipod mounted near the front of the handguard, providing additional support when firing from a prone or supported position. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a sleek, non-reflective appearance suitable for urban or tactical environments. The muzzle appears to have a small device, possibly a thread protector or compensator, but no large suppressor or brake is evident.
description: A matte black sniper rifle with a long barrel, telescopic scope, tactical stock, bipod, and detachable magazine, designed for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, bipod, pistol grip, and adjustable stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile, bipod legs, and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the scope along the top rail.
